dataset_path: /Volumes/dockcase2tb/database_all/股票数据/基础数据/沪深港通股票列表
notes: Six northbound HSGT constituents projected into StockBasicRecord shape. Three sourced from HK_SH (沪股通, is_hs=H): 600666.SH 奥瑞德, 600546.SH 山煤国际, 600084.SH 中信尼雅. Three from HK_SZ (深股通, is_hs=S): 300390.SZ 天华新能, 300503.SZ 昊志机电, 300037.SZ 新宙邦. ts_code, symbol, name, cnspell, market, list_date come from stock_basic; fullname from stock_company; exchange derived from ts_code suffix; list_status=L (listed, since present in stock_basic universe); is_hs derived from stock_hsgt type (HK_SH→H, HK_SZ→S); enname null (stock_company row does not expose en_name). Shape verified against StockBasicRecord at entity-registry/src/entity_registry/init.py:40-72.
